_publications._publicationTitle: Centralizing neurofibromatosis experimental tool knowledge with the NF Research Tools Database.

_contextSnippet: NF funding organizations like the Gilbert Family Foundation are attempting to expand the research community to non-NF1 researchers, and we anticipated that this database will lower the barrier of entry for these researchers
details: Expected to lower the barrier of entry for non-NF1 researchers to translate research advancements from other diseases to NF patients
